name: orbit-claude-extension
description: Orbit - Lifecycle Marketing System for Claude, packaged as a local Claude-first MCP extension.

scripts.check: node -e "const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const m=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8'));if(p.version!==m.version){process.stderr.write('Version mismatch: package.json '+p.version+' vs manifest.json '+m.version+'\n');process.exit(1)}console.log('Version check OK: '+p.version)" && for f in server/*.js scripts/*.js scripts/*.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo "Syntax check OK"
